stonetop.summary: The rare leader cagey enough to turn a gang of bandits into a serious threat.

system.concept: The rare leader cagey enough to turn a gang of bandits into a serious threat.
system.description: Most bandit gangs struggle to find victims or shelter, and quickly die out or disband. The clever ones last a few seasons, but eventually folk grow wary and their schemes start to fail. But every generation or so, a leader crops up cagey enough to turn a gang of bandits into a serious threat.
